heading: Sense of Congress regarding conduct of future activities
label: 450rr–5 Sense of Congress regarding conduct of future activities
text: It is the sense of Congress that research and limited exploration activities concerning the R.M.S. Titanic should continue for the purpose of enhancing public knowledge of its scientific, cultural, and historical significance: , That, pending adoption of the international agreement described in or implementation of the international guidelines described in , no person should conduct any such research or exploration activity which would physically alter, disturb, or salvage the R.M.S. Titanic.Providedsection 450rr–4(a) of this titlesection 450rr–3 of this title
